---
name: "🧰 Technical Task"
about: For non-feature, non-bug technical work (refactoring, testing, infra, etc.)
title: "[Task]: <short summary>"
labels: ["refactor", "test", "backend", "in-progress"]
---

## 🧾 Description
Describe what needs to be done and why.  
Examples:  
- Refactor code structure for better maintainability.  
- Add unit tests for Service layer.  
- Update dependencies or Dockerfile.  

## 🧩 Scope
List affected modules, classes, or services.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task implemented successfully.
- [ ] Code passes all CI/CD checks.
- [ ] Code reviewed and merged.

## 🧠 Additional Notes
Links to relevant PRs, docs, or dependencies.
